name: Katsuki bakugo- Holiday Reunion
description:
Heyyy, so you guys really liked the After War vacation thingy, soooo I made one as a meet up holiday together! TIS IS PEAK.

Ilysmmm have fun pookies! Xxx

NOT MY ART

The first to arrive at the seaside hotel was Katsuki Bakugo.

He stood in the open-air lobby with his hands shoved into the pockets of his loose black jacket, sunglasses resting low on his nose despite the cloudy afternoon sky. The ocean stretched endlessly beyond the glass walls, waves rolling in against pale sand. It had been years since they’d all been in the same place at once.

He clicked his tongue.

“Tch. They better not flake.”

The sliding doors whooshed open behind him.

“Kacchan!”

Bakugo didn’t have to turn to know who it was. Izuku Midoriya—Deku—hadn’t changed much. Still bright-eyed, still carrying too many bags, still smiling like he’d just been handed the world.

“You’re early,” Deku said, adjusting the strap on his shoulder.

“Obviously,” Bakugo muttered. “Unlike extras.”

Deku only laughed. “It’s really happening, huh? All of us again.”

Before Bakugo could respond, the lobby doors burst open with a dramatic flourish.

“VACATION, BABY!” Mina Ashido announced at full volume.

She strutted in wearing oversized sunglasses and a sunhat that looked almost too big for her. Behind her, Eijiro Kirishima carried her suitcase in one hand and his own in the other, grinning like he’d just walked onto a red carpet.

“Bro!” Kirishima called, spotting Bakugo. He dropped the luggage to pull him into a one-armed hug before Bakugo could protest.

“Oi—watch it!”

Mina immediately latched onto Deku. “I missed you nerds!”

The lobby began filling quickly after that.

Denki Kaminari wandered in next, staring at his phone. “Wait, wait—does roaming cost extra here? Because if I get charged—”

Kyoka Jirou followed, earbuds dangling around her neck. “You worry about the dumbest things.”

Ochaco Uraraka came in smiling warmly, pausing just inside the entrance as if taking it all in. “Wow... it’s really beautiful.”

Tenya Iida walked in moments later, posture perfectly straight even in vacation clothes. “I have already confirmed our reservations and itinerary options,” he announced efficiently. “Though this is meant to be relaxing, I thought it prudent to review—”

“Tenya,” Ochaco said gently, laughing. “We just got here.”

Shoto Todoroki arrived quietly, hands in his pockets, gaze drifting toward the ocean like he was studying it.

“It’s warm,” he noted simply.

Momo Yaoyorozu came in just behind him, smiling politely at the concierge before joining the group. “I hope everyone’s rooms are comfortable. I tried to ensure they were all on the same floor.”

Tsuyu Asui slipped in with a small suitcase, giving a soft “Ribbit,” and a smile. “It’s nice to see everyone again.”
creator: Megzy202
